name: Tax-Free Distilled Spirits for Foreign Embassies

eligibility.description: Applies to foreign embassies, legations, and authorized international organizations entitled to tax-free import privileges.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows distilled spirits to be withdrawn from bonded premises or customs warehouses free of tax for the official or family use of foreign governments and eligible international organizations.
